reference: Hello, I am a fifty-eight-year-old woman and have had back surgery on my L5-S1 five years ago. I am the proud owner of two rods, four bolts, etc. I have recently herniated another disc. My doctor is very good at his job. He has recently had me undergo a battery of tests. He has found a spot on my left rib and spine where the disc is herniated. He seems quite concerned about them and said he would like to conduct some more tests before I see the surgeon. He did not want to alarm me but suggested it might be cancer. I was wondering if it is, what are my options?
text: Hello, I am a 58 year old woman and have had back surgery on my l5s1 five years ago I am the proud owner of two rods fours, etc I have recently herniated another disc. My doctor is very good at his job He has recently had me undergo a battery of tests He has found a spot on my left rib and spine where the disc is herniated He seems quite concerned about them and said he would like to conduct some more tests before I see the surgeon He did not want to alarm me but suggested it might be cancer. I was wondering if it is what are my options?
